title: elaphoglossum pachydermum
intro: Elaphoglossum pachydermum, also known as the thick-skinned elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum pachydermum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve breathing, and aid in the treatment of coughs and colds. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the Elaphoglossum pachydermum plant are typically made into teas or infusions for consumption.
